{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}

''To be written.''

== Costs ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|costs}}
<% if (it.hasUpgradesSection) { %>
== Upgrades ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|upgrades}}
<% } -%>

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
